holdings.name: Maruti Suzuki India
holdings.description: India's dominant passenger vehicle maker with 40%+ market share. Produces 2M+ cars annually from Gurugram and Manesar plants. Hybrid/CNG-first strategy ahead of EV transition. Sub-₹10 lakh segment dominance through Alto, Swift, Baleno, Brezza, and Ertiga.

holdings.name: Mahindra & Mahindra
holdings.description: India's SUV market leader. Scorpio, XUV700, Thar — all oversubscribed. Farm equipment market leader (35%+ share). EV brand (BE 6e, XEV 9e) targets ₹15-25 lakh SUV segment. Tractor business provides counter-cyclical buffer.

holdings.name: Tata Motors
holdings.description: India's largest commercial vehicle maker and EV leader. Nexon EV is India's best-selling EV. Jaguar Land Rover (JLR) contributes 70%+ of consolidated profit — Range Rover, Defender demand remains strong globally.

holdings.name: Bajaj Auto
holdings.description: World's largest 3-wheeler exporter and India's 2nd largest 2-wheeler company. Export presence in 70+ countries. Chetak EV 2-wheeler growing share. CNG with Triumph (UK brand) mid-segment motorcycles hitting new price points.

holdings.name: Hero MotoCorp
holdings.description: World's largest 2-wheeler maker by volume with 50M+ cumulative units sold. Dominant in entry-level commuter bikes (Splendor, HF Deluxe). Rural India recovery and rural road expansion direct tailwinds. Launching premium motorcycles and EVs via Vida brand.

holdings.name: Eicher Motors
holdings.description: Royal Enfield owner — India's largest mid-size motorcycle company and fastest-growing global premium 2-wheeler brand. Hunter 350, Meteor, Himalayan and Classic 350 models dominate 200-500cc segment. VE Commercial Vehicles (trucks with Volvo JV) adds diversification.

holdings.name: TVS Motor Company
holdings.description: India's 3rd largest 2-wheeler maker. iQube EV is India's 2nd best-selling EV scooter. Apache motorcycle series competing with premium Bajaj. BMW JV (G310 series) builds export credibility. Strong Southeast Asia presence via Norton acquisition.
